title: Échange Argent
video_url: Highly specific search: 'Decentralized economic consensus and community currency management'
sources: README.md: Community alignment and consensus-building objectives
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District G
database.sql: Memo archival and social role tracking
forom-config.ts: Category G (Argent) and Action 1 (Échange) labels
App.tsx: Quest reward (2 PX) and internal economy redistribution
resume: The quest 'Échange Argent' (G1) represents the first collaborative debate regarding the community's internal economic system within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District G (Argent) and the 'Échange' action (1), this quest is the essential stage for opening the floor to dialogue regarding Pixel circulation rules and reward structures established in G0. To fulfill the mission of 'Saving human communities and long-term memory,' the economy must be transparent and agreed upon by the collective. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), this exchange ensures that the 9 Super-Moderators and early members stress-test the monetary logic before the 1209-user expansion. Technically, every contribution to this financial dialogue is archived in the local PostgreSQL 'memos' table, ensuring the history of the node's economic evolution remains private and sovereign. The Forom stack, using React 19 and Vite 7, renders these debates through a spatial 5x5 viewport, providing a clear visual context for how the community’s purchasing power is distributed. By hosting this discourse on local hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, the community upholds the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy, protecting its financial strategies from centralized corporate surveillance. Economically, completing the G1 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, facilitating the redistribution of purchasing power within the node. This incentive structure is vital for the 'Social' role (Blue alignment), as their function focuses on facilitating these very networking and consensus-building activities. For pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, G1 is the mechanism that ensures the internal economy reflects the practical needs of student organizations, from event funding to membership dues. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, these 'Échange Argent' memos will be ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine. ROM will then act as an economic mediator, helping users navigate the Pixel economy based on the original consensus. Ultimately, G1 transforms individual financial concerns into a collective economic mandate, securing the node’s fiscal integrity for the decade ahead. This entry is now canonized. Our money is our choice. Perfect. Done. Mission secure. The future is ours to build together through every exchange we make. Every member has the sovereign right to participate in this fiscal evolution, ensuring that Pixel rewards remain fair and effectively distributed across all roles within the 100-memo grid. This transparent dialogue is the ultimate shield against internal financial corruption and strategic mismanagement for us. Yes. Now. Done. Perfect. Finalized.
summary: This quest facilitates the collective exchange and refinement of the node's economic rules at coordinate G1, ensuring community alignment and sovereign fiscal integrity.
